name: 99 API — read-only state for dashboard
description: Read-only API endpoint that aggregates pipeline state (stats, projects, leads, featured approved lead with dossier+drafts, recent runs) into one JSON blob for the React dashboard. Single Postgres aggregate query.

parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'stats', json_build_object(
    'projects', (SELECT count(*) FROM projects),
    'companies', (SELECT count(*) FROM companies),
    'contacts', (SELECT count(*) FROM contacts),
    'contacts_with_email', (SELECT count(*) FROM contacts WHERE email IS NOT NULL),
    'leads', (SELECT count(*) FROM leads),
    'researched', (SELECT count(*) FROM leads WHERE researched_at IS NOT NULL),
    'drafted', (SELECT count(*) FROM leads WHERE status::text IN ('drafted','approved','rejected')),
    'approved', (SELECT count(*) FROM leads WHERE status = 'approved'),
    'rejected', (SELECT count(*) FROM leads WHERE status = 'rejected'),
    'outreach', (SELECT count(*) FROM outreach),
    'runs', (SELECT count(*) FROM runs)
  ),
  'projects', (
    SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
      'id', id, 'name', name, 'owner', owner_company,
      'region', region, 'state', state, 'source_url', source_url
    ) ORDER BY id) FROM projects
  ),
  'leads', (
    SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
      'id', l.id, 'contact', c.name, 'title', c.title, 'persona', c.persona,
      'company', co.name, 'domain', co.domain,
      'email', CASE WHEN c.email IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE regexp_replace(c.email, '^(.).+(@.+)$', '\1***\2') END,
      'project', p.name, 'fit_score', l.fit_score, 'score_reason', l.score_reason,
      'status', l.status
    ) ORDER BY l.fit_score DESC NULLS LAST)
    FROM leads l
    JOIN contacts c ON l.contact_id=c.id
    JOIN companies co ON l.company_id=co.id
    JOIN projects p ON l.project_id=p.id
  ),
  'featured_lead', (
    SELECT json_build_object(
      'id', l.id, 'contact', c.name, 'title', c.title, 'company', co.name,
      'project', p.name, 'fit_score', l.fit_score, 'research_dossier', l.research_dossier,
      'drafts', (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
          'channel', o.channel, 'subject', o.subject, 'body', o.body, 'approved_by', o.approved_by
        )) FROM outreach o WHERE o.lead_id = l.id)
    )
    FROM leads l
    JOIN contacts c ON l.contact_id=c.id
    JOIN companies co ON l.company_id=co.id
    JOIN projects p ON l.project_id=p.id
    WHERE l.status = 'approved' LIMIT 1
  ),
  'recent_runs', (
    SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(r))
    FROM (SELECT id, workflow, finished_at, items_out FROM runs ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10) r
  )
) AS state
